assertions.title: Mobile headers and filter bars stay usable without overflow

steps.action: Navigate to Sales Orders page on phone viewport
steps.expected: Header, search, filters, and primary actions visible and usable
steps.observed: Header with 'New Order' button, search input, status filter dropdown all visible and usable without horizontal scrolling

steps.action: Navigate to Dealers page on phone viewport
steps.expected: Header, search, and primary actions visible and usable
steps.observed: Header with 'New dealer' button and search input visible and usable

steps.action: Select status filter on Orders page
steps.expected: Filter dropdown opens and selection works
steps.observed: Dropdown opened, selected 'Draft' status filter successfully

assertions.title: Phone dialogs use bottom-sheet or full-height patterns with locked background scroll

steps.action: Open create-order drawer from Sales Orders page
steps.observed: Drawer opened from right side with close button, dealer selection, line items, discard and create buttons - appears phone-appropriate

steps.action: Attempt to access confirm dialogs (order cancel, dispatch confirm, return dialog)
steps.expected: Confirm dialogs render as phone-appropriate overlays
steps.observed: Unable to test - backend unavailable prevented loading any existing orders to test cancel/dispatch/return dialogs

evidence.network: Backend unavailable - orders could not be loaded

assertions.issues: Backend unavailability blocked testing of confirm dialogs (order cancel, dispatch confirm, return dialog). Video evidence of open-scroll-close behavior could not be captured.

assertions.title: Create-order flow is fully usable on phone

steps.expected: Drawer opens with dealer selection, line editing fields
steps.observed: Drawer opened successfully with dealer search button, product code, description, quantity, rate, discount fields stacked appropriately
Dealer search dropdown opened with list of dealers (Fixture Dealer FIX-DEALER, Mock GST Dealer GST-DEALER)
Selected 'Fixture Dealer FIX-DEALER', dealer displayed with clear selection button
Product code, quantity, and rate fields accepted input
Unable to verify - backend unavailable prevented order creation

evidence.network: Backend unavailable - orders API returned error

assertions.issues: Backend unavailability prevented testing full create-order submission and verifying live totals update. Video evidence of complete flow could not be captured.

assertions.title: Sales order detail stays readable and action-safe on phone

steps.observed: Page showed 'Couldn't load orders. Please try again.' - backend unavailable

steps.expected: Order detail page renders with phone-appropriate layout
steps.observed: Unable to test - no orders available due to backend unavailability

evidence.network: Backend unavailable - orders API returned error

assertions.issues: Backend unavailability prevented any order detail testing. Could not verify status progression, line-item layout, totals layout, or action affordances.

blockers.description: Backend at 100.109.241.47:8081 was unavailable during testing. The Sales Orders page displayed 'Couldn't load orders. Please try again.' which prevented testing of order-related functionality including order detail views, confirm dialogs, and complete create-order submission.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reloaded page, attempted to create new order, checked network requests - backend remained unavailable

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-MOBILE-002), 3 blocked (VAL-MOBILE-005, VAL-MOBILE-006, VAL-MOBILE-007) due to backend unavailability. VAL-MOBILE-002 confirmed mobile headers and filter bars are usable without overflow on phone viewport. Backend unavailability prevented testing of dialog patterns, complete create-order flow, and order detail views.
